comments.temperature: WARNING: CALIBRATION NOT FIT YET. Temperature=1.0 means NO scaling applied. Run: python train_bert_binary.py --dataset1 <path> --dataset2 <path> to fit temperature on labeled validation data.
comments.is_fitted: Whether TemperatureScaler has been fit. If False, temperature=1.0 and calibration is inactive.
comments.calibration_method: Method used for calibration: temperature_scaling or isotonic_regression
comments.thresholds: Cumulative thresholds for assigning Low (0), Moderate (1), Critical (2) risk tiers
